text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 16

md_respect: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often personal MD show respect

SAS Format: OFA

1: NEVER

2: SOMETIMES

3: USUALLY

4: ALWAYS

md_rxmeds: RECODE : Last 6 mths, took any prescription medicine

SAS Format: YNA

1: YES

2: NO

md_sptime: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often personal MD spend enough time with you

SAS Format: OFA

1: NEVER

2: SOMETIMES

3: USUALLY

4: ALWAYS

md_talkmeds: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often personal MD talk about all Rx
